title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
